mapper.select: SELECT * FROM zhandianzhoubian ORDER BY addtime DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zhandianzhoubian (zhandianmingcheng, tupian, daolumingcheng, xiangxidizhi, zhoubiangongjiao, zhoubianqingkuang, gengxinshijian) VALUES (#{zhandianmingcheng}, #{tupian}, #{daolumingcheng}, #{xiangxidizhi}, #{zhoubiangongjiao}, #{zhoubianqingkuang}, #{gengxinshijian})
mapper.update: UPDATE zhandianzhoubian SET zhandianmingcheng = #{zhandianmingcheng}, tupian = #{tupian}, daolumingcheng = #{daolumingcheng}, xiangxidizhi = #{xiangxidizhi}, zhoubiangongjiao = #{zhoubiangongjiao}, zhoubianqingkuang = #{zhoubianqingkuang}, gengxinshijian = #{gengxinshijian} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM zhandianzhoubian ORDER BY addtime DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
